name: Sataya Tis Tarn
original_name: สัตยาธิษฐาน
overview:
Pakin, a guy who was born in a wealthy family, was sent to live in America because Pakinee, his mother knows that he can remember his past life since he was 3 years old. She needs him to forget everything and sends him away, but his memories become clearer when he comes back.

Pakin met Rosawan when he came back to Thailand. She has the same face as the girl he's always dreamed of. He tries to get close to her to find out if she's the same person.

trailers.title: สัตยาธิษฐาน เร็วๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
